case_title: PAUL ALEXANDER DESPOTAKIS VS. RED SHAMROCK, INC., A CA. CORP. DBA PAT O'SHEA'S M

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESPOTAKIS, PAUL ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT RED SHAMROCK, INC., A CA. CORP. DBA PAT O'SHEA'S M AD HATTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
